representation_notes: Generated from existing deterministic measurements only.
No diagnosis, disease assignment, inference, or surgery simulation performed.

clinical_scope.units: voxel units unless calibrated by imaging metadata

notes: Disc numbering is mapped between sequential primary vertebrae.
Out-of-chain vertebra-labeled structures are retained and connected by nearest centroid.

segmentation.rationale: Existing masks and QC artifacts exist, but no independent clinical validation is present.

measurements.rationale: Rich geometric measurements exist; Phase 4.5 physical calibration is blocked. Physical calibration file explicitly reports blocked status.

state_vector.rationale: Patient state v2 and clinical state are structured and reusable.

graph.rationale: Spine graph is connected and used by propagation/scenario layers.

propagation.rationale: Deterministic graph propagation exists, but it is explicitly not physics.

scenario_engine.rationale: Scenarios and future states are generated consistently from existing state.

longitudinal_engine.rationale: Configurable time evolution exists, but no patient-specific temporal validation exists.

warnings: Physical calibration is blocked until trusted Patient Alpha spacing is available.
